title: Z-Cod Group
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Cod''' were a pair of [[modular conveyor]]s that belonged to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]. They were sent to loot equipment from [[ZA-13]]. However they were disabled by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], then boarded by imperial boarding parties to recover the cargo, before being destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-05-XX -->''[[TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire: Official Secrets & Solutions]]''
*<!-- 1996-04-XX -->''[[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
